creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Here is an excerpt of the build:


 Test of subprogram number 10            ICAMAX

GOTO_NUM_THREADS=1 ./zblat1

GOTO_NUM_THREADS=1 ./dblat2 < ./dblat2.dat
GOTO_NUM_THREADS=1 ./cblat2 < ./cblat2.dat
GOTO_NUM_THREADS=1 ./zblat2 < ./zblat2.dat
gmake[1]: *** [level2] Bus error: 10
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/math/gotoblas/work/GotoBLAS2/test'
gmake: *** [tests] Error 2
*** Error code 2
